patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+import mongoose from "mongoose";
+
+const backupLogSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
+  {
+    backupDate: {
+      type: Date,
+      default: Date.now,
+    },
+  backupPath: {
+  type: String,
+  default: "N/A",
+},
+    status: {
+      type: String,
+      enum: ["Success", "Failed"],
+      default: "Success",
+    },
+    database: {
+      type: String,
+      default: "bookstore",
+    },
+  },
+  {
+    timestamps: true,
+  }
+);
+
+export default mongoose.model("BackupLog", backupLogSchema);
\ No newline at end of file
